issue_title: Investigate how the TrayIcon can stay in a disconnected state
issue_body:
It appears that the TrayIcon can enter a state where it keeps asking for authentication but gets rejected.

More [details on the forum](https://forum.duplicati.com/t/release-2-1-0-101-canary-2024-12-06/19616/15).
pr_body:
Implemented support for disconnected state with TrayIcon.
Added some notification support (Windows and Linux).
Changed some logic to prevent hangs on clicks.

Updated logic for reconnect.
This fixes a case where using a wrong password could cause an infinite loop.

This fixes #5923
This fixes #5775
This fixes #5787
This fixes #5796
This fixes #5716
